name: The Back Nine Golf | Arlington TX - South

faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site if you don't have your own equipment.

faq.answer: The venue offers an on-site kitchen and full bar, though outside food and drink policies may vary.

faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulation times can vary but generally take 1-2 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.answer: The venue appears family-friendly with options for various age groups, though specific child accommodations weren't verified.
